# StructUI

> StructUI is a registry-first React UI system with reusable components, public docs, structured registry exports, and LLM-friendly discovery surfaces.

## Overview

- [Components](https://structui.com/components): Browse the component catalog.
- [Blocks](https://structui.com/blocks): Explore composable blocks and section patterns.
- [Ready to Go](https://structui.com/r2go): Browse starter templates and builder flows.
- [Theme Creator](https://structui.com/theme-creator): Build and export design token themes.
- [CLI Page](https://structui.com/docs/cli): Dedicated CLI docs surface.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/structui/structui): Source code, issues, and project history.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://structui.com/docs/introduction): What StructUI is and how the registry-first model works.
- [Installation](https://structui.com/docs/installation): Add struct-ui and configure the base setup.
- [Registry & LLMs](https://structui.com/docs/registry): Public machine-readable endpoints and LLM discovery surfaces.
- [Theming](https://structui.com/docs/theming): CSS variable driven theming and token customization.
- [CLI Usage](https://structui.com/docs/cli): Canonical strui command surface and examples.
- [Design Principles](https://structui.com/docs/principles): System principles behind composition, consistency, and scale.
- [Styling System](https://structui.com/docs/styling): Tailwind and token-level styling approach.
- [Accessibility](https://structui.com/docs/accessibility): Accessibility guarantees and expectations.

## Registry

- [registry.json](https://structui.com/registry.json): Global registry export with metrics and component index.
- [registry/index.json](https://structui.com/registry/index.json): Mirrored registry index export.
- [Component JSON](https://structui.com/registry/components/button.json): Example per-component structured record.
- [Component Markdown](https://structui.com/registry/components/button.md): Example component markdown document when available.
- [llms.txt](https://structui.com/llms.txt): Compact discovery-oriented LLM file.
- [llms-full.txt](https://structui.com/llms-full.txt): Expanded LLM reference with grouped component links.

## Components (56)

### Advanced Patterns

- [3D Pin](https://structui.com/docs/components/3d-pin): Interactive 3D hover card for standout links and showcases.
- [Command Palette](https://structui.com/docs/components/command-palette): Keyboard-driven search and action launcher.
- [Hero](https://structui.com/docs/components/hero): Landing page hero section for high-impact product messaging.

### Core

- [Badge](https://structui.com/docs/components/badge): Compact status indicator for labels, states, and metadata.
- [Button](https://structui.com/docs/components/button): Interactive button with multiple variants and sizes.
- [Loaders & Spinners](https://structui.com/docs/components/loaders): Animated loading indicators for async states and pending screens.
- [Typography](https://structui.com/docs/components/typography): Type styles and content patterns for structured text layouts.

### Data Views

- [Accordion](https://structui.com/docs/components/accordion): Collapsible sections for progressively revealing content.
- [Avatar](https://structui.com/docs/components/avatar): Profile image primitive with fallback states.
- [Calendar](https://structui.com/docs/components/calendar): Date and schedule UI for picking and browsing dates.
- [Charts](https://structui.com/docs/components/charts): Composable chart components for visualizing trends and distributions.
- [Data Table Advanced](https://structui.com/docs/components/data-table-advanced): Feature-rich table with sorting, filtering, and large dataset support.
- [Kanban](https://structui.com/docs/components/kanban): Board-style workflow layout for task and pipeline management.
- [Pricing](https://structui.com/docs/components/pricing): Pricing cards and plan comparison layouts.
- [Skeleton](https://structui.com/docs/components/skeleton): Loading placeholder blocks for content still in flight.
- [Stats](https://structui.com/docs/components/stats): Metric cards and summary layouts for dashboards.
- [Table](https://structui.com/docs/components/table): Standard table primitives for structured data.
- [Timeline](https://structui.com/docs/components/timeline): Sequential activity and event display for history-heavy screens.

### Feedback & Status

- [Alert](https://structui.com/docs/components/alert): Inline status and warning messaging.
- [Progress](https://structui.com/docs/components/progress): Progress indicators for uploads, steps, and async work.
- [Spinner](https://structui.com/docs/components/spinner): Compact loading spinner for buttons and small placeholders.
- [Toast](https://structui.com/docs/components/toast): Transient notification system for success, error, and info messages.

### Inputs & Forms

- [Checkbox](https://structui.com/docs/components/checkbox): Binary input for multi-select and consent flows.
- [Combobox](https://structui.com/docs/components/combobox): Searchable selection UI for larger option sets.
- [File Upload](https://structui.com/docs/components/file-upload): Drag-and-drop upload field for files and attachments.
- [Input](https://structui.com/docs/components/input): Standard text input field for forms and filters.
- [Input OTP](https://structui.com/docs/components/input-otp): Segmented one-time password input for auth flows.
- [Input Tag](https://structui.com/docs/components/input-tag): Tag entry input for labels, recipients, and multi-value fields.
- [Markdown Editor](https://structui.com/docs/components/markdown-editor): Markdown editor with live preview for content workflows.
- [Radio Group](https://structui.com/docs/components/radio-group): Single-selection input for mutually exclusive choices.
- [Select](https://structui.com/docs/components/select): Dropdown selection menu for predefined options.
- [Slider](https://structui.com/docs/components/slider): Range input for numeric selection and tuning.
- [Switch](https://structui.com/docs/components/switch): Toggle control for on/off settings.
- [Textarea](https://structui.com/docs/components/textarea): Multiline text field for messages, notes, and descriptions.
- [Toggle](https://structui.com/docs/components/toggle): Pressed-state control for compact option toggles.

### Layout & Structure

- [Aspect Ratio](https://structui.com/docs/components/aspect-ratio): Constrain media and embeds to a fixed aspect ratio.
- [Bento Grid](https://structui.com/docs/components/bento-grid): Editorial grid layout for feature sections and dashboards.
- [Card](https://structui.com/docs/components/card): Flexible container for grouped content, metadata, and actions.
- [Device Mockups](https://structui.com/docs/components/device-mockups): Device frames for product previews across desktop and mobile form factors.
- [Scroll Area](https://structui.com/docs/components/scroll-area): Styled scroll container for overflow-heavy content.
- [Separator](https://structui.com/docs/components/separator): Visual divider for grouping content and actions.

### Navigation

- [Breadcrumbs](https://structui.com/docs/components/breadcrumbs): Hierarchy-based navigation trail for nested pages.
- [Menubar](https://structui.com/docs/components/menubar): Desktop-style application menu bar.
- [Navigation Menu](https://structui.com/docs/components/navigation-menu): Advanced site navigation menus for headers and mega menus.
- [Pagination](https://structui.com/docs/components/pagination): Paging controls for list and table navigation.
- [Stepper](https://structui.com/docs/components/stepper): Step-based progress indicator for multi-stage flows.
- [Tabs](https://structui.com/docs/components/tabs): Tabbed navigation for switching between related content panels.

### Overlays

- [Alert Dialog](https://structui.com/docs/components/alert-dialog): High-stakes confirmation dialog for destructive actions.
- [Context Menu](https://structui.com/docs/components/context-menu): Right-click menu for contextual actions.
- [Cookies Banner](https://structui.com/docs/components/cookies-banner): Consent banner for privacy and cookie preferences.
- [Dialogs](https://structui.com/docs/components/dialogs): Modal flows for auth, confirmation, and focused interaction.
- [Dropdown Menu](https://structui.com/docs/components/dropdown-menu): Action menu for compact contextual choices.
- [Hover Card](https://structui.com/docs/components/hover-card): Preview card shown on hover for linked entities and metadata.
- [Popover](https://structui.com/docs/components/popover): Floating panel anchored to a trigger element.
- [Sheet](https://structui.com/docs/components/sheet): Slide-over panel for secondary flows and contextual tasks.
- [Tooltip](https://structui.com/docs/components/tooltip): Short contextual hint shown on hover or focus.
